description: Persistent registry of externally-validated mechanism collisions. Step 05.5 (v17) checks every new candidate's embedding against this list. If similarity > 0.5 to any entry, the candidate is REJECTED_KNOWN_COLLISION.
bootstrap_source_note: Bootstrapped from prior-corpus evidence: R279 (E12; original X-divergence+Y-state-regularizer collision), R827 (E34 INVESTIGATIVE retro-flagged by v16-E35 step 14.6 as EXTERNAL_COLLISION vs arXiv 2512.14879), R855 (E35 prospective EXTERNAL_COLLISION vs arXiv 2509.18411), and the 7-candidate variant_equivalence cluster (R756/R770/R777/R787/R805/R814/R823) — Lie-group equivariance super-mode.

entries.rationale: R279 was the original X-divergence + Y-state-regularizer collision pattern that v12 anti-R279 filter was designed to detect (vocabulary-specifically). KCD widens to functional class.
v15-E34 INVESTIGATIVE candidate; v16-E35 step 14.6 retrospective flagged as EXTERNAL_COLLISION. Same super-class as KCD_R279.

entries.candidate_description: L-function spectral residual structure (slot S05, analytic-number-theory)
entries.external_arxiv_title: Selberg-Trace Skip-Connection Network: Multiplicative Residuals via Zeta Eigenvalues
entries.rationale: v16-E35 prospective EXTERNAL_COLLISION at step 14.6. New super-class (X-spectral + Y-residual) distinct from R279/R827.

entries.candidate_description: 7-candidate cluster of Lie-group equivariance variants: R756 SU(2)-equiv, R770 tropical, R777 quiver, R787 crystal-basis, R805 SU(2)-product, R814 SU(2)-on-MoE, R823 Lie-on-discriminator; each variant is internally distinct but functionally equivalent under the variant_equivalence attack (Lie-group equivariance can be absorbed into baseline at small magnitude).
entries.rationale: v11-v13 INVESTIGATIVE candidates that all share the Lie-group equivariance super-mode; the variant_equivalence attack at step 13.5 demonstrated they collapse to the same mechanism under small-magnitude perturbation. v17 treats this as a single collision class.

entries.candidate_description: Sparsity-conditioned external memory routing (slot S07+S13, sparse-memory domain; Strategy B slot-combination)
entries.external_arxiv_title: Sparsity-Conditioned Retrieval Memory for Long-Context LLMs
entries.rationale: v17-E36 prospective EXTERNAL_COLLISION at step 14.6. Strategy B slot-combination (S07+S13 never-co-occurred prior) but external arXiv match. New collision class (X-sparsity + Y-retrieval-memory) distinct from prior 4 bootstrap entries.
